title: Man Arrested Near White House Dinner
summary: A man was arrested after firing shots at a hotel in Washington D.C. The hotel was holding a big dinner for reporters who cover the White House. The man's name is Cole Tomas Allen, and he is 31 years old. He is from California. Police say he had a shotgun, a handgun, and knives. He told police he wanted to shoot officials from the Trump administration. No one was hurt, and the man was taken to the hospital for a check-up. Police believe he acted alone. The man was a guest at the hotel. He will be charged with using a gun during a crime and attacking a federal officer. This happened on a Saturday night. The dinner is called the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

background_read: The White House Correspondents' Dinner is a yearly event where journalists, politicians, and celebrities gather. It is usually held at the Washington Hilton hotel.
